channel.title: Homepage on The Software Engineer Oasis
channel.description: Recent content in Homepage on The Software Engineer Oasis

item.title: Fang, async background processing for Rust
item.description: Even though the first stable version of Rust was released in 2015, there are still some holes in its ecosystem for solving common tasks. One of which is background processing.

item.title: About
item.description: I am Pepe Márquez Romero a computer science student based in Madrid. Education Universidad Politécnica de Madrid, School of Computer Science. Experience I am learning Java and C in the university degree. I have started developing in Rust since Summer 2020. I have stated developing in Python since March 2020. I have done significant contributions to open-source projects. Open Source projects weather_bot.
